violations.text: Several old droppings were observed in the back storage area along the walls. Areas to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2026
The floor under the shelving has an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2024
Several food items were observed adulterated due to rodent gnawing. PIC Voluntarily disposed of food. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by a large accumulation of droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2024
A dead rodent was observed on a trap in the back storage area. Dead rodents shall be removed from the premises. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving/ cardboard on shelves have an accumulation of rodent droppings. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2024
The door to the toilet room in the back food storage area is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2024

The floors in the back storage area and underneath shelving have an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2024
Multiple food and candy items observed with gnaw marks. PIC voluntarily disposed of food items. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2023

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by gnawed food/candy items. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2023
